fix_summary: Localized arithmetic fix in `create_booking` now multiplies flight price by passenger count, and the updated service tests validate both single-passenger and multi-passenger booking totals. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The core bug is corrected at the targeted location in `backend/app/services/booking_service.py` by changing `flight.price + passenger_count` to `flight.price * passenger_count`.
The regression coverage in `backend/tests/services/test_booking_service.py` includes both the reported 3-passenger case and the unchanged single-passenger case.
Automated test results passed (8 passed), which is the source of truth for readiness.
